WHO I AM

About Me

Web Development

Building clean, functional interfaces with HTML, CSS & JavaScript.

Server-Side Systems

Curious about how backends, databases, and logic come together.

B.SC INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY · RD NATIONAL COLLEGE ARTS AND SCIENCE

I'm Priyanka, a B.Sc Information Technology student at RD National College Arts and Science. I'm building a strong foundation in core programming and computing concepts, with a growing focus on how real-world software is structured and delivered.

My interest leans toward web development and especially the server side — understanding how data, logic, and infrastructure work behind the scenes to power what people see on screen.

I approach learning with curiosity and consistency, aiming to grow from a student into a capable, dependable IT professional.
